mano_cua.result_summary: Bug 确认复现。Step 1-8: 创建 timer 类型追踪器 Timer Test 并启动计时。Step 9-12: 等待约37秒后停止，显示 00:00:50。Step 13-15: 选择 Resume 恢复。Step 16-18: 发现 Resume 后计时器从 00:00:00 重新开始而非从 00:00:50 继续。14秒后显示 00:00:14，30秒后显示 00:00:30——完全从0重新计时，未保留之前累积的时间。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Bug confirmed: Timer resumed from 00:00:00 instead of continuing from 00:00:50 where it was stopped. After 30 seconds showing 00:00:30 further confirms the timer restarted from zero.

deploy_notes: commit 92f3b178ab. Vite dev server on port 5001.
